Slot: SECONDARY
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

SV FIRE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: CLR DRU SHM
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

FV prices are around 100p fer this item sometimes as high as 250p
▲ Page top
Can't use the Crys Eye
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2003 at 9:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776674933
48 posts
The problem is that it takes up the offhand slot only: that mean--no resist shield, no secondary weapon, no chance of using it in the range or ammo slot. Unless you are one-handed, there are other items that will do better in that slot. The resists are nice, but not irreplaceable.
Slappig, 48Ranger on Ayonae Ro
▲ Page top
Want to Sell
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2002 at 8:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781043950
4 posts
To all of you on Fennin Ro:
I just got one from a high level friend who doesn't need it anymore. Of course, I'm a mage and can't use it, so now I need to sell it. I've seen it selling for as much as 3000pp, but I'm listing it for 2k (and willing to lower price further if you have any mage gear to trade). Send a tell to Felinaar.

CRYSTALLINE EYE
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2001 at 2:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591755201219
3 posts

▲ Page top
Dumb Asses
QuoteReply
# Jun 27 2001 at 5:06 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757708844
1 post
Ok here it is I dont think its worth 4k i do belive its worth 1k you look at the item as a whole its giving 10 resist to fire magic and cold its shaman cleric druid.Ok shamans and clerics have better base resists and better reisist items to obtain.As far as druids go fire magic and cold are by far the worst seen ive playing any class on this game.For people to say that it is worthless or is only worth say 200pp or around that is just plane stupid.This item is really for druids it isnt meant to be a uber stat raiser like most farmers or campers would like its a simple item placed in the game for druids to stab at to raise stats for possible raids in any dungeon.I think a lvl 51 druid that posted on here has better gear due to him being 51 or i should hope so.But to wrap it up Druids you wont find to many itmes that raise stats with hp and mana all in one on off hand item.Really i do miss the Ac on my Charred Guardian Sheild but as a druid Shammy Cleric you not supposed to really tank we support or allow pets and Warriors Tank so Ac isnt a major issue.So please before you make an *** of your self look at the whole picture plus what classes can use it.This semi flame is meant for all that posted just a few Dumbasses
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 26 2001 at 11:19 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I have one of these bad boys for sale on bertoxx, send me an offer.
Not a good item ???
QuoteReply
# May 29 2001 at 9:10 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Neptunis and others on medication, what are you talking about ???

The question is not about mana ,HP, or AC but resist .
An item will only mana or HP is nothing at higher level ; once you reach 40 and more, any caster class uses spells which cost 200 mana each cast so who cares about even +50 mana ?

What will you do with an item + 50 mana or AC when you will be summoned , or a cold, fire AOE on you ?

200 PP for +10 resist magic, fire, cold ???? ah ah ah ...
As some people said, it s a very usefull items for raids. Goto make a little visit to Nagafen or Lady Vox without fire or cold resist and see what happen.

Just think twice before to post


▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 10:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) An items rarity in itself doesn't mean squat as far as determining value. An items worth is based on its utility. Plus 10 to several resists is nice but even the Dwarven ringmail tunic from CB or the Mistmoore sheild give plus 10 to several resists and both are relatively simple to obtain. If it makes you feel better looting a "rare" **** then feel good about yourself because you sure got one.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 10 2001 at 12:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I looted this item about a week ago on the Drinal Server, since then I've been auctioning it with no serious buyers. Why is this item so hard to unload? It is very rare, and has awesome stats. I've been trying to sell it for 2K, which seems to me to be a steal. I wish I could use it myself, I definitely would. If anyone is interested in it, send me a tell.
Good item
QuoteReply
# May 07 2001 at 12:00 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592757411902
106 posts
if you're on a PvP server...this would be a nifty thing to have hot-boxed with your shield.

If you find yourself hooked up with a caster you can switch to this from shield and help yourself out...especially vs wizzies.

QuoteReply
# Mar 22 2001 at 3:01 PM Rating: Decent

View User Forum

This thing is awsome in some encounters like raids duels and PVP.. it's got mad resists. and they nerfed it so it drops a lot less now... but i'll definatly trade my book for this in and vox trip or anything like that.
▲ Page top
Where do they get these prices????
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2001 at 7:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591752393526
Scholar
281 posts
Sorry, I really like this board and it gives some good info but what's up with these prices? Off hand only, no AC, good stats. A serious upgrade over the Skull of Jen'Tra, but 4k, give me a break. Please leave the price open till you get something that's reasonable. Looks like a 200pp piece to sell to twinks. Once you get to lvl 20 there are alot of lower level items that give you more mana with some AC. Nice resist stats on this though, so maybe more than 200, but definately less than 1k.
▲ Page top
Heh just try and get one yourself
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2001 at 9:14 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

This is a VERY rare drop from Shardtooth, an already rare spawn. Just try to camp it yourself. I've been in GD for several weeks and have seen Shardtooth all of once. He was kind enough to give his all for me (and his Eye hehehe).

As for its utility, why do you think the Crown of the Froglok Kings is as valuable as it is? Or any other high resist gear that's a rare drop in a high level area, for that matter. This is an awesome item, and I wouldn't even think of selling it for less than 4 K. But then I wouldn't even think of selling it. It goes into my growing collection of good resist items. The fact that it gives me mana and HP too is just gravy.

Believe me, they may not be you, but there are people standing in line to buy one of these things...and most of them think 4 K is a BARGAIN.

Valafea Ravenwind
Druid of the 51st Turning
Mithaniel Marr


▲ Page top
RE: Heh just try and get one yourself
QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2001 at 9:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756951812
23 posts
froggie crown is valuable because of killer ac+ low wt. Ive tried selling this eye at 1.5k on rathe and got laughed outta the zone almost...dropped price to 400pp and nobody has bothered to even try and counter offer. a nice item, indeed, but pity the poor soul trying to sell one.

herring
rathe

I won the thing a few weeks ago after we whacked the guy that drops this. Everybody here seems to think it's worth an easy 3k. Unfortunately I can't sell the thing. The character I have it on plays on Brell and his name is Tludaan. Send me a tell, I'd gladly part with it for 3k.
▲ Page top
RE: Where do they get these prices????
QuoteReply
# Mar 18 2001 at 1:33 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'd buy it at 4Kpp. The item packs what you need the most in a raiding situation, resist versus magic *and* fire/cold. I wouldn't wear the thing on a day-to-day situation but +10 to Save v M/F/C is huge. Tack on a few hp/mana and it is a great situational item.
▲ Page top
RE: Where do they get these prices????
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2001 at 7:57 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
this is a great raid item, not an everyday one, no. I would buy at 4k in a heartbeat. Oh, wait, i just did five minutes ago, hahahaha.
seriously tho, if i was up against naggy or vox i would much prefer this to most any shield, well worth price, and is why i now have one.
